name: Merry Snap Shot
description: Merry Snap Shot is the December 2014 counterpart of Snap Shot in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Merry Snap Shot is the December 2014 counterpart of Snap Shot in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was introduced as a special festive variant to celebrate the season of giving.
quote: Celebrate the season of giving with Merry Snap Shot
personality: Merry Snap Shot embodies the festive spirit of the holiday season, specifically the 'season of giving.' As a Trap Master, he remains a dedicated protector of Skylands, but with a jolly, winter-themed disposition.

story.content: Merry Snap Shot was released in December 2014 as a festive counterpart to the Trap Master Snap Shot. He is one of the few holiday-themed characters exclusive to the mobile game Skylanders: Lost Islands.

content: Celebrate the season of giving with Merry Snap Shot

trivia: He, Jolly Bumble Blast, Holiday Wash Buckler, Missile-Tow Dive-Clops, Jingle Bell Chompy Mage and Winterfest Lob-Star are the only Skylanders who are Christmas counterparts.
Merry Snap Shot and Winterfest Lob-Star are the only Christmas Trap Masters.
Coincidentally they are both Water element.
Merry Snap Shot and Holiday Wash Buckler are the only Christmas Skylanders who are exclusive to the Lost Islands.
Coincidentally, they are also counterparts of non-core Water Skylanders that were on a Starter Pack.
gameplay: As an Alter Ego in Skylanders: Lost Islands, Merry Snap Shot serves as a holiday-themed version of Snap Shot. While he functions similarly to his standard counterpart in the mobile environment, his primary distinction is his festive appearance and his status as a Christmas-themed Trap Master.
